zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cross於1610年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可武爾皮特時，他的父親Thomas Cross30歲，母親Rachel Anna Dising26歲。他於1635年與Hannah Cross在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1676年10月16日在美國緬因州約克威爾斯享年66歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cross于1610年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可武爾皮特时，他的父亲Thomas Cross30岁，母亲Rachel Anna Dising26岁。他于1635年与Hannah Cross在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1676年10月16日在美国缅因州約克威爾斯享年66岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克威爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Cross
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross, such as one set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, from Middle English cros (Old English cros and Old Norse kross, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem). It is commonly Latinized in medieval records as ad crucem and de Cruce but examples of this can just as well belong to the synonymous but less common name Crouch . In a few cases the surname may have been given originally to someone who lived by a crossroads, but this sense of the word seems to have been a comparatively late development. In other cases, the surname (and its European cognates; see 3 below) may have denoted someone who carried the cross in processions of the Christian Church, but in English at least the usual word for this sense was Crozier .
Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cross’ or ‘the cross’, such as French Lacroix , German Kreutz , and Slovenian and Croatian Križ (see Kriz ).

variants.name: Crouch
meanings: English (southeastern): from Middle English crouch(e), cruch(e) ‘cross’ (Old English crūc, ultimately from Latin crux, crucem; the Old English crūc was replaced in Middle English by the word cross, from Old Norse kross), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a cross.

variants.name: Croce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Angelo, Carlo, Nicola, Salvatore, Vito, Antonio, Gino, Rocco, Saverio, Amadeo, Amerigo.

from croce ‘cross’ (from Latin crux, genitive crucis), applied as a topographic name for someone who lived by a roadside cross, or a nickname for someone who carried the cross in religious processions. Compare English Cross .

variants.name: Grose
meanings: Cornish: topographic name for someone who lived near a stone cross set up by the roadside or in a marketplace, Cornish crous (from Latin crux, crucis). Compare Cross .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Gross  .

variants.name: Crosse
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cross  .

variants.name: Kreutz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Gottfried, Orlo, Reinhold.
German: topographic name for someone who lived near a cross set up by the roadside, in a marketplace, or as a field or boundary marker, from Middle High German kriuz(e) ‘cross’. Compare Cross .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cross was born in 1610, in Woolpit, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Cross, was 30 and his mother, Rachel Anna Dising, was 26. He married Hannah Cross in 1635, in Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 16 October 1676, in Wells, York, Maine, United States, at the age of 66, and was buried in Wells, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cross est né en 1610, à Woolpit, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Cross, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Rachel Anna Dising, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Cross en 1635, à Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1676, à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Wells, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cross 1610 in Woolpit, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Cross 30 und seine Mutter Rachel Anna Dising 26. Er hat 1635 in Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Cross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1676 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Wells, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cross è nato il nel 1610 nel Woolpit, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Cross, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Rachel Anna Dising, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Cross nel 1635, nel Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1676, nel Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Wells, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Crossが1610年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウルパトで生まれた時，父Thomas Crossは30歳，母Rachel Anna Disingは26歳であった。1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスでHannah Crossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1676年10月16日にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークウエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cross(이)가 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보피에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cross(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Rachel Anna Dising(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스에서 Hannah Cross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1676년 10월 16일 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 웰스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cross nasceu em 1610, em Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Cross, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Rachel Anna Dising, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Cross em 1635, em Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1676, em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cross родился в 1610 г. в местности вулпит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Cross было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Rachel Anna Dising, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Cross в 1635 г. в местности миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 16 октября 1676 г. в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности веллс, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cross nació en 1610, en Woolpit, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Cross, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Rachel Anna Dising, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hannah Cross en 1635, en Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1676, en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Wells, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
